meaning: n.(警方根据证人对嫌疑犯或罪犯脸部和头发特征的描述综合多张照片而成的)照片拼凑人像法
examples: The girl sat down with a police artist to compile a Photofit of her attacker.
Rather than commissioning an artist or employing photofit software, officers put together a caricature of the man they want to trace using a tool intended for gamers to create their own characters.
They also failed to circulate to them the photofit of her two assailants and to the local media.
They ran Crimewatch appeals and reconstructions, carried out offender profiling, compiled maps of where the burglaries happened and released a photofit of a man in a balaclava.
